category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Seqtk as a fast lightweight tool for FASTA/FASTQ processing.
source_facts.description says it is a toolkit for processing FASTA/Q sequences.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface with installation and usage examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/lh3/seqtk; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README includes FASTA/FASTQ examples and bioinformatics topics.
